title: Three-state blocker contract
description: JSON Schema for blockers emitted on stderr by HEPhaestus model-building skills. Three modes: fatal, recoverable, reference_only. See SHARED.md §Three-state blocker contract and §2.7 of phase2-plan-final.md.

code.description: SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE error code. Known fatal codes: SARAH_DOWNLOAD_FAILED, SARAH_SMOKE_TEST_FAILED, SARAH_OUTPUT_MISSING, SARAH_OUTPUT_CORRUPT, ANOMALY_CANCELLATION_FAILED, MODELSPEC_INVALID, WOLFRAM_KERNEL_ABSENT, GFORTRAN_ABSENT, SPHENO_DOWNLOAD_FAILED, SPHENO_BASE_BUILD_FAILED, SPHENO_PATH_INVALID, SPHENO_COMPILE_FAILED, SPHENO_NO_OUTPUT, ANALYTIC_MODULE_MISSING, ANALYTIC_INTERNAL_ERROR.

context.description: Optional: structured diagnostic data (paths, stderr excerpts, etc.).

user_instruction.description: Optional: exact shell command or action the user must take to unblock. Required when the error is user-actionable (e.g. missing Homebrew, Wolfram activation). See §2.8.

oneOf.title: recoverable blocker
oneOf.description: Error that allows scan rows to be marked bad and execution to continue.

code.description: SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE error code. Known recoverable codes: SPHENO_SPECTRUM_PROBLEM, SPHENO_RGE_NONCONVERGENT, ANALYTIC_INVALID_PARAMS, ANALYTIC_SPECTRUM_PROBLEM.

message.description: Human-readable description of the recoverable condition.

user_instruction.description: Optional: user action to attempt recovery.

oneOf.title: reference_only result
oneOf.description: Skill fell back to a reference method (analytic, literature) instead of running the real tool. Per PR-D commit f72e19e and reviewer Blocker #25.

reference_method.description: Non-empty description of the reference method used.

caveats.description: Non-empty list of caveats about the reference result.
